title: Green Hydrogen Plant Fueling GermanyГўв‚¬в„ўs Industrial Future
content: Linde plc secured a ГўвЂљВ¬4.3 million boost from the regionГўв‚¬в„ўs FUTURE ENERGY programme and the EUГўв‚¬в„ўs ERDF. The mission: build a 5 MW green hydrogen plant by end-2026. Once itГўв‚¬в„ўs humming, expect roughly 450 tonnes of green hydrogen a yearГўв‚¬вЂќenough juice for local refineries, chemical producers, and transport hubs without burning a single fossil fuel.This isnГўв‚¬в„ўt a solo act. Saxony-AnhaltГўв‚¬в„ўs Ministry of Economics backed the bid, and the EUГўв‚¬в„ўs ERDF chipped in. Minister Prof. Dr. Armin Willingmann calls it a blueprint for regional renewal. On the other side, Linde brings 145 years of gas-engineering expertise and deep R&D in green hydrogen.
author: Analysts Account
